name: jellyfin
title: Jellyfin
description: Find Movies and Shows on your Jellyfin Instance
author: d2a

commands.name: list-movies-series
commands.title: Search Movies and Shows
commands.description: Browse Movies and Shows from your Jellyfin Instance

commands.name: list-collections
commands.title: Search Collections
commands.description: Browse Collections from your Jellyfin Instance

commands.name: scheduled-tasks
commands.title: Search Scheduled Tasks
commands.description: Browse and Control Scheduled Tasks from your Jellyfin Instance

commands.name: recent-sessions
commands.title: Search Recent Sessions
commands.description: Browse and Control Recent Sessions from your Jellyfin Instance

preferences.name: jellyfinBase
preferences.title: Jellyfin Base URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Jellyfin Instance

preferences.name: jellyfinUserID
preferences.title: Jellyfin User ID
preferences.description: The API requires a user ID to query media items from. You can get it by going to 'Administrator -> Users -> [Username]' and then copy the ID from the URL

preferences.name: jellyfinApiKey
preferences.title: Jellyfin API Key
preferences.description: Get the API Key from 'Administrator -> API Keys -> [+]'

preferences.name: columns
preferences.title: Grid Columns
preferences.description: Must be a number between 1 and 7

preferences.name: showWatchedStatus
preferences.title: Show Watched Status
preferences.description: Adds the '✅' prefix in front of movies/series you already watched
preferences.label: Show a checkmark for media you already watched

preferences.name: showFavoriteStatus
preferences.title: Show Favorite Status
preferences.description: Adds the '❤️' prefix in front of movies/series you marked as favorite
preferences.label: Show a heart for media your favorited
